docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KABATZNICK, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT PAYCHEX INC.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KABATZNICK, JEFFREY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-03-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAYCHEX INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KABATZNICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAYCHEX INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED HE WOULD LIKE TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE HIS CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT AS THE MATTER HAS BEEN RESOLVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,502.63 FILED BY KABATZNICK, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT PAYCHEX INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
